result.summary: The page is mostly functional-looking, but there are several visual/content defects: a spelling error in the main navigation ('Jacpots'), a truncated navigation label ('Hot Gam'), game tiles clipped at the right edge of the viewport, and the last row of game tiles is partially obscured by the sticky bottom navigation bar.

issues.description: The navigation tab is labeled 'Jacpots' instead of 'Jackpots' — a visible spelling error in a primary navigation element.
The 'Hot Gam...' navigation tab is cut off at the right edge of the screen with no clear visual affordance (fade/gradient or arrow) indicating the tab bar is horizontally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add a scroll affordance such as a gradient fade or chevron indicator, or adjust tab sizing so labels are not abruptly clipped.

issues.description: Game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' carousels are hard-clipped at the right viewport edge (e.g., 'MAGNI... PHO...', 'MUNC... MI...'), cutting titles mid-word.
issues.suggestion: Use partial-tile peeking with consistent sizing and a fade indicator, or snap tiles so clipping looks intentional; ensure critical text isn't cut mid-word.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles (e.g., 'Who Wants To Be A Millionaire') is partially hidden behind the sticky bottom navigation bar, obscuring content.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding equal to the nav bar height to the scrollable content area so tiles are fully visible when scrolled into view.

issues.description: Jackpot amounts overlaid on game tiles (e.g., '$6,259.12', '$13,013.88') sit directly on busy artwork with limited contrast/backing, reducing readability.
issues.suggestion: Add a semi-transparent dark background strip or stronger text shadow behind jackpot values to ensure legibility.
